rulings.Case Title: VICTOR TUNG VS. AMI QI et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: MOTION FOR LEAVE TO File Amended Cross-Complaint Against Mark Minh Dai And Wendy Lo
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for December 14, 2017 line 1. CROSS COMPLAINANT AMI QI's MOTION FOR LEAVE TO File Amended Cross-Complaint Against Mark Minh Dai And Wendy Lo Hearing Required. Qi to present (1) a declaration stating that she is available for discovery including a deposition, specifying availability dates and (2) a proposed motion to continue trial; and (3) proposed ex-parte application for an order shortening time to continue trial; or (4) in lieu of (2) and (3) a stipulation to continue trial. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: VICTOR TUNG VS. AMI QI et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: MOTION To Contest The Good Faith Of The Settlement Entered Into Between Plainitff Victor Tung And Defendant Mark Minh Dai
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for December 14, 2017 line 1. CROSS COMPLAINANT AMI QI's MOTION To Contest The Good Faith Of The Settlement Entered Into Between Plainitff Victor Tung And Defendant Mark Minh Dai Hearing Required. By no later than 9:00 a.m. moving party to file a supplemental brief, not to exceed 3 pages outlining the specific amount of total damages stemming from Qi and Dai common liability to Tung, specifically identifying what those damages are; how much was allocated for those damages in Qi's settlement agreement (Qi settlement agreement to be attached with relevant provisions highlighted); what is Qi's and Dai's proportional liability to Tung for each identified category. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Calendar Matter: MOTION FOR LEAVE TO File Second Amended Complaint For Personal Injury And Property Damages
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for December 14, 2017 line 2. PLAINTIFF SCOTT DYKES' MOTION FOR LEAVE TO File Second Amended Complaint For Personal Injury And Property Damages OFF CALENDAR per request of the moving party. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: GLORIA YEE VS. FAT NOODLE 2ND SF, LLC, ET AL
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for December 14, 2017 line 3. PLAINTIFF GLORIA YEE's MOTION To Add Doe Defendants GRANTED. Amendment to be filed forthwith. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: CRAIG OSTERBERG VS. JOHN STEWART COMPANY
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Motion For Leave To File Cross-Complaint; Memorandum Of Points And Authorities
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for December 14, 2017 line 4. DEFENDANTs JOHN STEWART COMPANY and MERCY HOUSING CALIFORNIA's Motion For Leave To File Cross-Complaint GRANTED. Cross-Complaint to be filed forthwith. = (501/REQ)
